canonical_definition: The Moral Foundations Character Action Questionnaire, a 16-item instrument designed to assess the moral dimensions of a fictional character's behavior based on Moral Foundations Theory, using a 5-point Likert scale.
papers: Do All Autoregressive Transformers Remember Facts the Same Way? A Cross-Architecture Analysis of Recall Mechanisms
